ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_loadings" (
  "loading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the loading record */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loading location */,
  "loading_date" TEXT /* Exact date of loading */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo being loaded */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific vehicle used for loading */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver responsible for the loading */,
  "loading_status" TEXT /* Status of the loading (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the loading */,
  "total_load" INTEGER /* Total load in tons for the corresponding year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_loadings_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., LDVs, HDVs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "max_load_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum load capacity of the vehicle type in tons */,
  "average_fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Average fuel efficiency of the vehicle type in miles per gallon */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of required maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the year record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which data is recorded */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the annual metrics record */,
  "loading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated loading record */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loading location */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific vehicle */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver responsible for the metrics */,
  "loading_status" TEXT /* Status of the loading */,
  "distance_traveled" TEXT /* Distance traveled during the year in miles */,
  "fuel_consumed" TEXT /* Fuel consumed during the year in gallons */,
  "total_load" INTEGER /* Total load in tons for the corresponding year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_metrics_loading_id FOREIGN KEY ("loading_id") REFERENCES vehicle_loadings ("loading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "loading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loading data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_loading_id FOREIGN KEY ("loading_id") REFERENCES vehicle_loadings ("loading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
